message:
feat: SimpleUpdateDeleteByRowidRange fast path, Transaction::last_insert_rowid simplification, and test/bench improvements

connection.rs — New PreparedUpdateDeleteFastPath variant for
UPDATE/DELETE with rowid range WHERE clauses, executed directly
against MemTable. Also adds SimpleCountStarByRowid and extends
GroupConcatByColumn to handle column aliases in GROUP BY.

transaction.rs — Replace query-based last_insert_rowid() with direct
Connection::last_insert_rowid() call, avoiding SQL compilation overhead.

interop_integrity.rs — Formatting: break long .execute() chains.

comprehensive_bench.rs — Add prepared_direct_insert_* fields to
profile snapshot initializer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
